name: Crazy Neon Square Rush
description: Crazy Neon Square Rush is a fast-paced hyper-casual arcade game where reflexes and focus are everything. Control a glowing neon square as it constantly moves upward through an endless stream of colorful obstacles. The longer you survive, the faster and more intense the game becomes. Earn score automatically by staying alive, dodge neon blocks, and push your limits to beat your best score. With smooth controls, vibrant neon visuals, dynamic difficulty scaling, and a clean modern interface, Crazy Neon Square Rush delivers a satisfying and addictive arcade experience. Easy to learn, hard to master, and perfect for short or long play sessions.
instructions: Move the neon square left or right to avoid incoming obstacles while it automatically moves upward Score increases as you survive longer Dodge fast react quickly and try to beat your highest score in this endless arcade challenge
